nasb.text: Then Hushai said to Absalom, “No! For whom the Lord, this people, and all the men of Israel have chosen, his I will be, and with him I will remain.

esv.text: And Hushai said to Absalom, “No, for whom the Lord and this people and all the men of Israel have chosen, his I will be, and with him I will remain.

cnv.text: 戶篩回答押沙龍：“不！耶和華和這民，以及以色列眾人所揀選的，我應該歸屬他，與他在一起。

ccb.text: 户筛说：“我不去，谁是耶和华和全体以色列人民所拣选的，我就归属谁，留在谁那里。
